data.raceName: SPORTSBET SUPPORTERS OF HAVING A CRACK
data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. BUSH MAYHEM charged out of the inside draw with a fast early sectional but swamped late when a close up fourth (22.37) at Warrnambool over 390m. Strong form has emerged from his last run. Can bounce back. 2. PERIODICAL is a sprinter who excels over the short dashes. Was a strong winner last time (19.43) over 350m at this track in a Grade 5. Form at the trip strong including one wins. Shapes as a top winning chance on latest effort. 1. TORNADO TESSA first look at this trip and drops in distance on last start. Drawn to advantage and should enjoy a good run. Can hit the frame with the right run. 5. BUSH CIRCUS won by a wide margin last start. Must be respected.","runners":[6,2,1,5],"exclusive":false}
